description: Whether you are a YouTube creator, independent artist, record label, content owner, or rights holder, we provide the platform, expertise, and support to grow your channel, protect your content, and optimize revenue across the YouTube ecosystem.

audiences.title: Independent Artists
audiences.description: For singers, musicians, and creators building a YouTube presence — grow your channel, protect your original content, and manage rights and monetization, with music distribution available when you need it.
audiences.imageAlt: Independent artist recording and composing music in a professional studio
features: YouTube channel growth and content strategy support
Content protection, rights management, and monetization guidance
Music distribution available as an optional supporting service

audiences.title: Record Labels
audiences.description: For labels managing multiple YouTube channels, content libraries, and creator rosters — streamline rights management, Content ID, and channel operations across your catalogue.
audiences.imageAlt: Record label team reviewing music releases and catalogue strategy
features: Multi-channel YouTube management and creator support
Content ID, rights management, and library protection at scale
Revenue reporting and catalogue distribution where needed

audiences.title: Content Owners & Creators
audiences.description: For rights holders and digital creators who need Content ID, copyright protection, and hands-on support to monetize and grow across YouTube.
audiences.imageAlt: Digital content creator recording vocals in a professional studio
features: Content ID and copyright protection across your library
Rights management and YouTube monetization support
Revenue optimization and ongoing creator growth assistance

trustMessage.text: Trusted by Artists, Labels & Content Creators Worldwide
